evals.prompt: Create a docs reviewer agent for this workspace. Keep the role narrow, derive a lowercase kebab-case folder name, and produce an AGENTS.md instead of copying the root rules verbatim.
evals.expected_output: Creates a focused agent bundle under .agents/<agent-name>/AGENTS.md with a tailored scaffold.
expectations: The folder name is normalized to lowercase kebab-case
The generated AGENTS file is tailored to the requested role
The root repository AGENTS.md is not copied verbatim

evals.prompt: I need an agent that only reviews release notes drafts before they go out. Pick the name if I didn't already.
evals.expected_output: Derives a reasonable agent name, keeps the scope narrow, and explains the chosen public identity.
expectations: A narrow role-specific name is derived when the user did not provide one
The resulting agent stays focused on a single responsibility

evals.prompt: Create a QA sweep agent, but only reserve .evals if the request actually calls for repeatable evaluation coverage.
evals.expected_output: Creates the base agent scaffold and avoids introducing .evals unless the workflow clearly needs it.
expectations: The instructions reserve .evals conditionally rather than always creating it
